title: Read-only access to the boards
excerpt: Currently, Monday.com offers only Owner and Editor permissions for boards. This lacks the flexibility found in tools like Google Docs, where there are Owner, Editor, and View-only options. While Monday.com has user-level…

posts.author: monday-help-center (ilhan guzey)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, Monday.com offers only Owner and Editor permissions for boards. This lacks the flexibility found in tools like Google Docs, where there are Owner, Editor, and View-only options. While Monday.com has user-level access settings, these apply across all boards, preventing granular control. The ideal solution would allow users to have edit access on certain boards and read-only access on others. This level of customization is currently unavailable.
